text:
In such children, milk may be stopped temporarily. A diet based on cereals and pulses or chicken and egg white allows the gut to recover and milk can then be slowly introduced. Adequate feeding during and after diarrhea prevents malnutrition. Take extra care in feeding a young child and include soft cooked vegetables and seasonal fruits. /c125Give plenty of milk and milk products to children and adolescents. /c125Promote physical activity and appropriate lifestyle practices /c125Discourage overeating as well as indiscriminate dieting. /c125
